title: No Tree Punching Refreshed
description: «Punching Trees» No Tree Punching Mod texture upgrade
body:
«Punching Trees» is the texture update for «No Tree Punching» mod
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95d9ab5c9e021aa002d8b7558efb673315cd522b.png)
No Tree Punching is a great mod that improves the early stages of survival, but its textures are outdated. This resource pack is designed to enhance the experience with this mod. «Punching Trees» improves all blocks and items textures in it, making them more vanilla and suitable for modern versions of Minecraft.
![all](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45fc3668815c6cd3c58e2daa62d282da2448377b.jpeg)
This resource pack made for the latest(7.1.0) version of «No Tree Punching»
